description_long: This helmet features a robust, high-tech design with a textured, carbon-fiber-like shell and a prominent, reinforced front section. The upper dome displays a woven, basket-like pattern, while the lower half is finished in a sleek, diagonal carbon weave. The front includes a dark, full-face visor and integrated breathing apparatus, suggesting use in aviation or tactical scenarios. Side-mounted hardware, such as adjustment dials and communication modules, are visible, along with a coiled cable extending from the lower front. The rear and sides are equipped with additional connectors and reinforced panels, enhancing both protection and functionality. The overall construction appears lightweight yet extremely durable, suitable for demanding urban or operational environments.
description: A high-tech, carbon-fiber helmet with a woven dome, full-face visor, and integrated breathing and communication hardware. The design is robust, with side and rear attachments and a sleek, modern finish.
description_view_0: Front view shows the full-face visor, breathing apparatus, and the woven dome pattern most prominently.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the adjustment dial, side hardware, and the transition between woven and carbon-fiber textures.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the carbon-fiber weave, rear connectors, and cable routing along the back of the helmet.
description_view_3: Right side view reveals additional hardware, side attachments, and the continuation of the woven and carbon-fiber patterns.
attribute_graphic_design: The helmet features a dual-pattern design with a woven basket-like texture on the dome and a diagonal carbon-fiber weave on the lower half, with no additional graphics or text.
